hero.headline: Watch a Digital Asset Federation Get Built in Public.
hero.subheadline: AI Now Guide follows the real-time build process behind an 80+ property AI-first digital asset portfolio. Watch raw working sessions, website builds, AI workflows, SEO experiments, schema architecture, and portfolio decisions as they happen.

workstation.heading: Not a Course Studio. The Actual Build Desk.
workstation.body: This is not polished content. It is the real workstation: laptop, mic, coffee, window, and daily portfolio work.

why.heading: Why This Exists
why.body: Most creators stop working to create content. AI Now Guide documents the work while it happens. The goal is not polished content. The goal is preserved process.

federation_cta.heading: Want to watch this build happen?
federation_cta.body: AI Now Guide is the public operating window into a real AI-first digital asset portfolio being built in real time.

seo.meta_title: AI Now Guide | Watch a Digital Asset Federation Get Built in Public
seo.meta_description: Watch raw AI workflow sessions, website builds, SEO experiments, and portfolio decisions in real time. Build in public. No editing. No fluff. Just process.
